source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Elegant humanist English UI with Japanese typography guidance for destination headings, itinerary body text, booking labels, search filters, table numerals, and calm travel-service workflows.
layout: Calm 8px product grids, rounded basin rhythm, compact travel dashboards, itinerary timelines, booking tables, quiet forms, restrained shadows, and 8px cards and controls.

prompts.label: Transparent cenote pool motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a cenote pool motif, isolated full subject, no surrounding travel scene, no people, no text.
Subject: One compact tropical cenote pool cutout: clear turquoise circular sinkhole water seen slightly from above, pale cream limestone rim with eroded karst texture, small hanging roots, a few glossy deep-green tropical leaves and fern fronds tucked around the rim, subtle underwater blue-green depth, mineral ledges, and calm reflective water surface. The motif should read as a cenote pool emblem for a serene travel design system.
Composition/framing: centered complete object with generous padding on all sides; show the full irregular limestone ring and turquoise pool as one isolated motif, not cropped; balanced top-down three-quarter view.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves turquoise water, limestone texture, soft green foliage, and tranquil sinkhole depth.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no people, no buildings, no boats, no animals, no large landscape background, no beach, no sky, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection outside the pool.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cenote light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Cenote", derived from the visible isolated cenote pool motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible serene travel system.
Reference use: Use the visible cenote pool motif as the source of truth. Extract clear turquoise water, deep teal sinkhole depth, pale limestone karst, warm mineral beige, mossy olive edges, glossy tropical green leaves, hanging root texture, calm reflections, and rounded basin geometry. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cenote, Cenote Pool, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: clear turquoise water primary, deep teal depth for active states and charts, limestone surfaces, warm karst neutrals, tropical green accents, moss olive status, lagoon highlight, root brown detail, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: serene travel product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use an elegant humanist sans with soft editorial display moments, plus Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for destination headings, itinerary body, booking labels, search filters, table numerals, and quiet service workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 旅程, 検索, 予約, 水質.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, itinerary timeline, water-depth line chart, visitor bar chart, booking table, guide roster table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple travel/water/leaf icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, limestone texture swatches, water ripple texture, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, serene tropical travel dashboard, limestone-white surfaces, turquoise primary actions, deep-teal active navigation, tropical green success/status accents, karst-stone borders, subtle water-ripple and limestone texture, calm hierarchy, compact travel operations data, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cenote", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cenote dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Cenote". It must feel like the same serene travel system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible cenote pool motif and the visible light-mode board.
Reference use: Use the visible cenote motif and light-mode board as references. Preserve turquoise water primary controls, deep teal navigation and data states, limestone surface language, tropical green success/status accents, karst-stone borders, subtle ripple and limestone texture, 8px radius language, compact travel dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cenote, Dark Mode, Cenote Pool, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest cenote teal background, midnight lagoon panels, clear turquoise primary, aqua highlights, limestone mist text, pale karst borders, tropical green accents, moss olive success, root brown warning detail, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: serene travel product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use an elegant humanist sans with soft editorial display moments, plus Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for destination headings, itinerary body, booking labels, search filters, table numerals, and quiet service workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 旅程, 検索, 予約, 水質.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, itinerary timeline, water-depth line chart, visitor bar chart, booking table, guide roster table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple travel/water/leaf icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, limestone texture swatches, water ripple texture, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from the cenote's deepest water, elevated panels in midnight lagoon, limestone-mist foreground text, turquoise primary actions, aqua focus rings, tropical green active navigation and success/status accents, pale karst borders, subtle water ripple overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cenote", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
